---
title: "DeepFlow"
subtitle: "Science beneath the surface"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:inline-block; font-size:18px; padding:4px 16px;
    border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.3);
    color:#BAE6FD; margin-bottom:16px; letter-spacing:0.08em;">
    SCIENCE · CODE · INSIGHT
  </div>
  <div style="width:48px; height:3px; background:#38BDF8;
    margin:0 auto 20px; border-radius:2px;"></div>
  <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; justify-content:center;">
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);
      color:#7DD3FC;">Groundwater</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);
      color:#7DD3FC;">Geochemistry</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);
      color:#7DD3FC;">Hydrology</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);
      color:#7DD3FC;">AI & Python</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);
      color:#7DD3FC;">MODFLOW</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);
      color:#7DD3FC;">PHREEQC</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
地下水・地球化学・水文学の研究ノウハウ（Series）から英語勉強（Bible）まで。  
科学・コード・多様な観点で、水の世界を探求するサイトです。

---
